name: AUTOLIV INC
summary: General Autoliv, Inc. (Autoliv, the Company or we) is a Delaware corporation with its principal executive offices in Stockholm, Sweden where it currently employs approximately 113 people. The Company functions as a holding corporation and owns two principal subsidiaries, Autoliv AB and Autoliv ASP, Inc. The Company's fiscal year ends on December 31.
